sections.paragraph: an unused verb, which seems, from the derived nouns, to have had the sense of hollowness, שֹׁעַל hollow of the hand, מִשְׁעֹל hollow way, שׁוּעָל fox, as being a burrower and an inhabitant of caverns. Kindred are שָׁאַל No. II.; whence שְׁאֹל Orcus (Hölle), and in the Indo-Germanic languages, κοῖλος (cœlum), hohl.
